item.dc:creator: mrsdowneyjr

item.title: Sometimes its feels awful being alone
item.description: That includes sex. My last boyfriend cheated on me after 3 years of being together. I was devastated when I found it out. Depression takes. I start drinking and trying to drown your sorrows with alcohol for 10 years takes it tall. Im 36 now. I dont know what I achieve saying this but it feels good and you have to start somewhere to get it all together. Sorry for bad English and grammar. Not native. Edit: Thank you everyone for kind words. Happy pride moth everyone
item.dc:creator: coffeecleric

item.description: Having grown up listening to his comedy albums, it's funny how nostalgic I got from a silly little song like this Sauce: "100% fresh" on Netflix

item.title: I did more pride things and I didn't get hate crime'd!

Worn to my city's main pride festivities
Worn to another party, this one was a Y2Gay theme!
item.dc:creator: blueKD

item.title: Go Vote!
item.description:
2024 is a mega election year and the EU elections are taking place this week. This is the 2nd largest election in the world - around 350 million people are eligible to vote. Just like the elections in India and the USA this year - this one is very important for coexistence on our planet. Therefore, we want to use our reach and call on all those who are entitled to vote to make their voice heard.
We must not leave the EU to the far-right parties and must defend our democracies. Please vote.
item.dc:creator: Warandpeasofficial

item.title: The 443rd vol. of "I'm not actually removing these from my phone, I just wanted to share them so I could feel some sort of connection in this dismal world" Dumps - Pride Month 2024 ep 3
item.description:
HAPPY PRIDE MONTH! FUCK THESE COMPANIES IN PARTICULAR!
Bus Racists
If only
STAY TUNED! I'll be releasing more MeeMays back into the wild *every other* Monday-Friday around 11:30 am, GMT-5, in my ""I'm not actually removing these from my phone, I just wanted to share them so that I could feel some sort of connection in this dismal world" Dumps" Or use Imgur's "Follow" Feature, which will alert you whenever one of my dumps goes Viral. If you wish to chat, I'm frequently in ElbowDeepInAHorse and PotatoCheesMonk's Discord Servers between the hours of 7pm and 1am GMT-5 during the week, and at unpredictable but frequent times Saturdays and Sundays.
GAY SE[BIRD]
So gay
There is ONE hetero explanation for it: Daphne, not having much meat on her bones, was far too cold in that lingerie to sleep. Velma felt that she could sleep comfortably in Daphne's outfit, and offered to switch 'fits with her BEST FRIEND so they could both sleep comfortably. You can even see the start and end of the conversation: "It is SO COLD tonight! There's no way I can get to sleep in just this teddy!" ... "Yeah, I could be comfortable in this. At least for one night." But it's probably something gay.
Fuck all ads in particular
[ BRICK INTENSIFIES ]
Me when I see a really hot guy
THE WATERFALLS ARE TURNING THE SKY GAY!
@ElbowDeepInAHorse
Yes
This is my newly commissioned Signature Image, by Dark Arts Studios. He also made me one where the Chonk (me) is holding a Progress Pride flag and a Bi Pride flag. That will be featured at the end of next week's dumps. He's no longer on The Imgurs, I met him on ElbowDeepInAHorse's Discord Server. Here's where you can see his work: https://twitter.com/Anubis23342060 https://www.furaffinity.net/user/thed4rk1ord/ https://tailsofthegods.com/ https://dark-arts.itch.io/ FUN TIP / LIFE FACT / PRO HACK I upvote 90% - 99% of positive or neutral comments on my posts, as well as ≈50% of negative ones Shoutout to my fellow Dumpers: @DeafKitten @CodyBurkett @OhValleyOfPlenty @AbbiiStabbii @DigiT00l @MemeMuseumCurator @CeleryMan7 @DumpsterKoala @JebidiahBeetus @Kaeldra @KirbyVictorious @HermioneDanger00 @DumpReview @WhiskeyJelly @JasonPositivityPilot @danat101 @PotatoCheesMonk @VanessaNelson @NotMuchBiggerThanAWomprat @MindNumbingBraIncAndy @TheMellowMoron @TheWoodsAreVile @ThatOtherGirlYouKnow @IStealMemesAndStuff @DrWalters @DaymanAhAAAAah @SecretHarpy Lemme know If you are a Regular Dumper and would like to be added to the list! Archive Of Previous Dumps: Vols 1-300: https://imgur.com/a/vAfF9Wz Vols 301+ : https://imgur.com/a/oDakPaq Updated Whenever I Can Get Around To It #LGBTQIA #PrideMonth #Pride_Month #Pride #LGBTPride #Phone_Dump #Meme_Dump #Memes #MeeMays #AdolfHitlerSchoolForTheArts #TheWhoring20s #SaveTheBEEEEEES #BeeLM #SaveTheBees #JettfreyEpsfuelCandnt #CommeltSteelBeamicide #WhatIfNobodyShotJFK #AndHisHeadJustDidThat #EatingAppsTakingNaps #EatNamesAndTakeAss #MasturbatingIsNecrophilia #IfYoureDeadInside #DumpyMcGeeAndGuyNamedSteve #2Dumps1Site #AllTiddiesAreGoodTiddies #FreeTheNipple #GregFromHR #SteveFromAccounting #DougFromSales

item.title: I feel this pain
item.description: Having lost my mom not too long I feel his pain. I'm not close to my family at all. Mom raised us to be so independent and distant, me and my siblings don't even get along. Now at my loneliest moments I don't have her anymore to make me feel better.

item.title: A UK homeowner took pics of the Fox cub that decided to move into their garden. They named it "Riko"
item.description: Evidently they have foxes visit every year to have a litter of cubs under their deck, but this time they left behind one of the cubs. Riko was checked out by wildlife rescue who deemed him healthy and safe to continue as he is. The cub comes and goes as it pleases to hunt and fend for itself, but chooses to come back to stay at the user's backyard. Source: https://www.reddit.com/user/HereToStealTheSnacks/
item.dc:creator: Pasquinel

item.title: A wholesome dog dump for y'all. With a bit of a plea for help
item.description: Hope this dump made your day a little bit better. We're struggling a little bit atm and really could use your help so if you feel like it, please take a minute to look at our pool, maybe share it around. Any help will be appreciated greatly https://www.paypal.com/pools/c/9567aJbxhF
item.dc:creator: TyrCarter

item.title: A photo of my dog Panko every day
item.description:
The lil man came home today! The vets called throughout the day with updates about Panko. They said he had started to eat some food and had perked up a lot more after the surgery. He did have pretty bad diarrhoea apparently and they had to give him a bucket bath to clean him up. Panko has a slight dank smell to him at the moment but that’s ok. He has a fentanyl patch on his leg which will stay there until Friday to help manage the pain. I think it is making him a bit like this tho O_O he’s pretty spaced out and sometimes will be just standing and staring off for ages. Otherwise everything seems to be going well! Panko has had a couple of small tail wags so I know he must be feeling so so much better. We take the bandage off his tummy tomorrow so we can monitor it visually to make sure it doesn’t get inflamed/infected.
The evil rock! They let me keep it.
item.dc:creator: PankoBoy
